HowlingWind - Rollback Netplay for Naruto GNT4
===============================================

SETUP:
1. Place your GNT4.iso in the "games" folder
2. Run HowlingWind.exe
3. Go to Settings and verify the Dolphin path is correct
4. Go to Practice or Play Online to start playing!

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
- WebView2 Runtime (usually pre-installed on Windows 10/11)
  If the app doesn't open, install from: https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/webview2/
- A GameCube controller adapter (optional, Xbox controller works too)

PLAY ONLINE:
- Host a lobby or join with a room code
- Direct Connect: enter your friend's IP:Port for LAN play
- The app handles NAT traversal automatically via STUN

CONTROLS:
- GC Adapter on Port 2 is supported
- Xbox/PC controllers work via Dolphin's input settings
- Press ESC to exit an embedded game

Built with Tauri + Svelte + Rust
